WORKSHEET #5 - Why do you do the things you do?
Now ask yourself: Why? Why do you do the things that you do?
The answers to these questions will often produce profound and meaningful stories.
What do you do that you don’t tell others about?
What do you conceal from friends or loved ones?
What makes you anxious or nervous?
What makes you frightened?
What brings you shame?
Look for habits and ask yourself, “How did this habit originate?
When do you pretend to be something you’re not?
What moments in the day are especially hard for you?
What moments in the day bring you joy?
When is your response to others surprising to you?
